member.name: M:TaskTracker.WebAPI.Controllers.TasksController.PutTask(System.Guid,TaskTracker.Core.Entities.TaskItem)
member.summary: Route paramenter name and method paramenter name should be same, otherwise it will not bind the value from route to method parameter and you will get 400 bad request error Use IActionResult as the return type of the method, which allows you to return different types of responses (e.g., 204 No Content, 404 Not Found, etc.) based on the outcome of the update operation.
